arts.ttl: Andre Onana 'rested' for Newcastle match, but will Man United number one return against Lyon?
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana will allegedly not be involved in Sunday's Premier League clash with Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Man United and Chelsea 'joined by surprise Premier League side' in race to sign £30m Ipswich striker Liam Delap
arts.sum: Everton manager David Moyes is plotting a move for Ipswich striker Liam Delap as part of a broader summer rebuild - and he's prepared to bide his time to land the 22-year-old frontman.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana left out of Man United squad for Newcastle trip
arts.sum: Andre Onana has not been included in the Manchester United squad to face Newcastle United at St James’ Park today. Onana has not travelled with the squad for the Premier League clash, amid a difficult week for the Cameroon international. The 29-year-old was at fault for both goals during Manchester United’s 2-2 draw with Lyon […] The post Andre Onana left out of Man United squad for Newcastle trip first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Where Newcastle United legends that thrashed Man United 5-0 are now
arts.sum: Shearer probed down the left-wing and sprayed a pass to Peter Beardsley who rattled a shot at the big Dane in the Man United goal, Ferdinand followed up but was denied by another fine block, but Big Al would grab his goal against the team he turned down just weeks earlier. Bez also takes part in ambassadorial work for United and was recently spotted at the club's fan event in Covent Garden ahead of the Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Phil Foden's 'mum puts £3m mansion up for sale a week after 'vile' chants about her from Man United supporters'
arts.sum: Claire Rowlands, 45, disgracefully became the subject of appalling chants from Red Devils supporters during last Sunday's limp 0-0 stalemate at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man United 'determined to sign' Amsterdam-born wonderkid branded 'the next Jude Bellingham'
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly determined to win the race for Ajax teenager Abdellah Ouazane, who is currently starring for Morocco Under-17s.

arts.ttl: Onana dropped from Man Utd squad to face Newcastle
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana is left out of Sunday's Premier League game at Newcastle following two costly mistakes against Lyon this week.

arts.ttl: 12 players could miss Newcastle vs Man United amid Anthony Gordon and Alexander Isak doubts
arts.sum: Manchester United will return to Premier League action on the back of a draw to Lyon in the Europa League quarter final

arts.ttl: Andre Onana DROPPED for Man Utd's trip to Newcastle after Lyon horror show
arts.sum: Andre Onana will not be in goal when Manchester United face Newcastle at St James' Park on Sunday having not travelled with the team to Tyneside following his difficult spell

arts.ttl: Andre Onana left out of Manchester United squad to face Newcastle after errors
arts.sum: The goalkeeper has endured a difficult week on and off the pitch
